_comment: Template for round corrections. Copy this file, name it after the round (e.g. seapoint_2026-04-21_corrections.json), and edit to fix any errors you spot in the classifier output.
exclude_markers: _comment: marker numbers to drop (double-presses, noise). Example: [33, 44]

reassign_hole._comment: Move a shot to a specific hole. Example: {'marker': 39, 'hole': 13}

insert_shots._comment: Add a missing shot on a specific hole. 'position' is 1-indexed within the hole. Example: {'hole': 13, 'position': 1, 'class': 'pitch'} inserts a missed pitch as H13's first shot.
